title: The Human Connectome: A Complex Network
journal: Annals of the New York Academy of Sciences
abstract: The human brain is a complex network. An important first step toward understanding the function of such a network is to map its elements and connections, to create a comprehensive structural description of the network architecture. This paper reviews current empirical efforts toward generating a network map of the human brain and discusses emerging findings about its organization.
notes: Review of empirical connectome mapping efforts as of 2011.
